_meta.title: R2B.1 — DPH Regime Decision Tree (REDO)
_meta.supersedes: _wave-output/wave-01/W1.2/W1.2-transition-decision-tree.md (Part B and Part E — DPH portions)
_meta.law: Act 235/2004 Sb. as amended by Act 461/2024 Sb., effective 2025-01-01
_meta.confidence_overall: HIGH — all structural changes confirmed from Tier A source
key_changes_from_original: filing_deadline: 10 working days from breach DAY (was: 10 calendar days after month end)
standard_platce_date: 1 January of following year (was: 1st of 2nd month after breach)
implementing_act: Act 461/2024 Sb. (was: Act 349/2023 Sb. — wrong)

dph_regime_classification.measurement_period_note: All obrat checks from 2025-01-01 use calendar year (Jan 1 – Dec 31). Resets to zero each January.

Q_CURRENT_STATUS.question: What is the entity's current DPH status?

Q_PLATCE_THRESHOLD_EXCEEDED.question: Has calendar-year obrat (§ 4a Act 235/2004) exceeded CZK 2,536,500 in the current year?

Q_STANDARD_THRESHOLD.question: Has calendar-year obrat exceeded CZK 2,000,000 in the current year?

Q_EARLY_OPTIN.question: Does the entity wish to become plátce from the next day after breach (§ 6 odst. 2 písm. a) opt-in)?

yes.condition: Must cite § 6 odst. 2 písm. a) in registration form AND file within 10 working days of breach day

Q_IO_EU_GOODS.question: Has cumulative value of goods acquired from EU member states in this calendar year exceeded CZK 326,000 (ex-tax)?

Q_IO_EU_SERVICES.question: Has the entity received a taxable B2B service from an EU-established person where place of supply is Czech Republic (§ 9 reverse charge)?

yes.open_question: Q-20260523-004 — confirm no monetary threshold applies

Q_VOLUNTARY_DPH.question: Does the entity wish to register voluntarily as plátce DPH?

no.note: No DPH obligations on domestic supplies

threshold_1_standard_mechanics._comment: Breach of CZK 2,000,000 — standard path (§ 6 odst. 1 Act 235/2004)
threshold_1_standard_mechanics.legal_basis: § 6 odst. 1 + § 94 Act 235/2004 as amended by Act 461/2024 Sb.
threshold_1_standard_mechanics.gfr_quote: Plátcem se osoba stane od 1. ledna kalendářního roku bezprostředně následujícího po kalendářním roce, ve kterém její obrat v tuzemsku překročil částku 2 000 000 Kč.

computation.filing_deadline_holiday_rule: if last day is Saturday/Sunday/holiday, shift to next working day (§ 33 odst. 4 daňového řádu)

threshold_1_standard_mechanics.gap_period_note: Entity remains neplátce from breach date through 2025-12-31. No DPH on supplies in this period. No retroactive DPH liability. This is intentional legislative design per § 6 odst. 1.
threshold_1_standard_mechanics.first_return_reclaim: § 79 Act 235/2004 — input DPH on stock on hand at den plátcovství is reclaimable in first DPH return

threshold_1_optin_mechanics._comment: Optional early plátce from next day after CZK 2,000,000 breach (§ 6 odst. 2 písm. a)
threshold_1_optin_mechanics.legal_basis: § 6 odst. 2 písm. a) Act 235/2004 as amended by Act 461/2024 Sb.
threshold_1_optin_mechanics.gfr_quote: Rozhodnutí, že chce být plátcem již dnem následujícím po překročení částky 2 000 000 Kč, musí příslušná osoba sdělit správci daně ve včas podané přihlášce k registraci (tj. do 10 pracovních dnů ode dne překročení částky obratu).

computation.form_requirement: Application must cite § 6 odst. 2 písm. a) Act 235/2004

late_filing_fallback.rule: If application is filed AFTER the 10-working-day window, the opt-in election is void. Entity defaults to § 6 odst. 1 — den plátcovství = 1 January of following year.
late_filing_fallback.gfr_quote: V případě pozdě podané přihlášky k registraci se tedy osoba stane plátcem až od 1. 1. následujícího kalendářního roku.

threshold_2_mechanics._comment: Mandatory immediate plátce from next day after CZK 2,536,500 breach (§ 6 odst. 2 písm. b)
threshold_2_mechanics.legal_basis: § 6 odst. 2 písm. b) Act 235/2004 as amended by Act 461/2024 Sb.
threshold_2_mechanics.gfr_quote: Pokud výše obratu v tuzemsku překročí v příslušném kalendářním roce částku 2 536 500 Kč, stane se daná osoba plátcem dnem následujícím po překročení této částky.
threshold_2_mechanics.threshold_origin: EUR 100,000 EU SME regime cap converted to CZK

computation.form_field_06: § 6 odst. 2 písm. b) zákona o DPH

scenario_already_filed_threshold_1.description: Entity had already filed registration citing § 6 odst. 1 after exceeding CZK 2,000,000. Later exceeds CZK 2,536,500 before year end.
scenario_already_filed_threshold_1.action: Entity must file a NEW registration form citing § 6 odst. 2 písm. b). Den plátcovství becomes the next day after the CZK 2,536,500 breach — earlier than the originally registered 1 January.
scenario_already_filed_threshold_1.gfr_quote: Dané osobě vzniká povinnost podat v zákonné lhůtě novou přihlášku k registraci. Plátcem se stává ze zákona dříve než 1. 1. 2026.

obligations.dph_priznani: filed when qualifying supply event occurs
obligations.souhrnne_hlaseni: filed for intra-EU B2B services supplied

conditions: Entity has been plátce for at least 1 year (§ 107a Act 235/2004)
Calendar-year obrat in the preceding period has not exceeded CZK 2,000,000
OR: entity has ceased all business activity
deregistration.settlement_rule: § 79a Act 235/2004 — repay input DPH on held assets. Fixed assets: pro-rata by remaining useful life. Inventory and other assets: 100% repayment.
deregistration.confidence: MEDIUM — § 107a and § 79a primary text fetch pending

gap_period_analysis._comment: Reframing of Q-20260523-001 under post-2025 law

threshold_1_standard.description: Entity exceeds CZK 2,000,000 mid-year. Becomes plátce 1 January of following year.
threshold_1_standard.supplies_before_den_platcovstvi: Issued as neplátce — no DPH charged, no retroactive DPH liability.
threshold_1_standard.supplies_from_den_platcovstvi: Must include DPH at applicable rate.
threshold_1_standard.input_reclaim_on_held_assets: Available under § 79 for assets held at den plátcovství — first DPH return.
threshold_1_standard.legislative_intent: Intentional design. § 6 odst. 1 is explicitly prospective. No liability gap.
threshold_1_standard.failure_to_register: § 107 Act 235/2004 — if entity fails to register, tax authority may assess DPH from the date entity should have become plátce. This is a penalty provision, not a retroactivity rule.

threshold_2_immediate.description: Entity exceeds CZK 2,536,500. Becomes plátce next day.
threshold_2_immediate.supplies_before_breach_day: Issued as neplátce — no DPH charged, no retroactive liability.
threshold_2_immediate.supplies_from_den_platcovstvi: Must include DPH from the day following the breach.
threshold_2_immediate.cutoff: Precise day-level cutoff. No ambiguity — all invoices on or after den plátcovství must carry DPH.

gap_period_analysis.resolution: Q-20260523-001 RESOLVED. No retroactive DPH liability under either path. Gap period is intentional legislative design under Act 461/2024 Sb.

pre_2025_transitional._comment: For breaches that occurred up to 31.12.2024 — old rules apply
pre_2025_transitional.applies_when: Breach of CZK 2,000,000 occurred in the period ending on or before 2024-12-31
pre_2025_transitional.filing_deadline: 15 calendar days after end of breach month
pre_2025_transitional.den_platcovstvi: 1st day of 2nd calendar month after breach month
pre_2025_transitional.legal_basis: § 94 odst. 1 Act 235/2004 as effective up to 31.12.2024
pre_2025_transitional.gfr_quote: Překročí-li výše obratu osoby povinné k dani do 31. 12. 2024 za období 12 po sobě jdoucích kalendářních měsíců částku 2 000 000 Kč, postupuje podle právní úpravy účinné do 31. 12. 2024.

kh.pre_registration_invoices: never reported in KH regardless of issue date

sh.io_obligation: intra-EU B2B services supplied where recipient is EU VAT payer
sh.platce_obligation: intra-EU goods and intra-EU B2B services
sh.mid_year_split: SH periods split at transition date. IO-period SH and plátce-period SH are separate filings.

date_calculation_rules.deadline_start: Day AFTER the breach event (§ 33 odst. 2 daňového řádu)
date_calculation_rules.weekend_holiday_shift: If last day falls on Saturday, Sunday, or public holiday — shifts to next working day (§ 33 odst. 4 daňového řádu)
date_calculation_rules.unit: working days (pracovní dny) for plátce registration; calendar days for IO registration
